_comment: Manual overrides for the DRAFT: clause text when OCR misses discipline icons or returns a garbled snippet. Key is the card name (case-insensitive). Remove an entry to fall back to the OCR-cleaned text.
Bribes: DRAFT: [pre] As above and this vampire gets +1 vote.
Carrion Crows: DRAFT: [pre] As [ani] above; but only for this round.
Cryptic Mission: DRAFT: [pot] D Inflict 1 damage on a minion and enter combat with them.
Earth Meld: DRAFT: [tha] Strike: dodge, with 1 optional press, only usable to continue the combat.
Form of the Bat: DRAFT: [ani] This vampire gains 1 maneuver during the combat this action.
Meat Cleaver: DRAFT: [brujah] Strike: strength+1 damage; with optional maneuver each combat; only usable to get to close range.
Quickness: DRAFT: [ani] Strike: dodge, with additional strike.
Scorn of Adonis: DRAFT: [toreador] As above, and gain pool if the referendum passes.
Swallowed by the Night: DRAFT: [combat] Do not replace until after combat. Maneuver.
Telepathic Misdirection: DRAFT: [for] Reduce bleed against you by 3.
Theft of Vitae: DRAFT: [pro] Strike: steal 1 blood or life.
Thing: DRAFT: Draw 1 card from your crypt.
Dog Pack: DRAFT: [gangrel] As above, and they cannot strike: dodge.
Far Mastery: DRAFT: Search your library and/or ash heap for an ally or retainer card, reveal it and move it to your hand.
Gather: DRAFT: [gangrel] As above, but you can choose Gangrel the same age or older.
Hide the Mind: DRAFT: [cel] [combat] Cancel a combat card requiring Presence [pre] as it is played.
Magic of the Smith: DRAFT: [tha] As [tha] above; but you can also search your ash heap.
My Enemy's Enemy: DRAFT: Requires a ready vampire. As [AUS] above but not usable if an older vampire is acting.
Protected Resources: DRAFT: As above, but don't burn this card unless your minion bleeds for 2 or more.
Summoning, The: DRAFT: [PRE] As [PRE] above; but ignore the requirements of the ally.
Arms Dealer: DRAFT: [brujah] As above, but the Arms Dealer can also search your ash heap.
Force of Will: DRAFT: [aus] +1 stealth action: This vampire unlocks.
Obedience: DRAFT: As [dom] above; but do not replace until your unlock phase.
Body Flare: DRAFT: Only usable in combat with an ally or a younger vampire. Strike: 2 aggravated damage.
